title: carex scandinavica
intro: Carex scandinavica, also known as the Scandinavian sedge, is a type of perennial grass-like plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Carex scandinavica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and even help to lower blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, with some practitioners also using it in topical creams and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
